text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Yasuda Kinen, where the spring
King of the Mile is crowned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka declares she'll take out her strong
opponents with her newly refined dash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Yasuda Kinen's track has long straight
stretches, perfect for Vodka to run full-throttle.
